<!-- Maintainer note:
Use this page as the single place for publications, datasets, and deliverables.
Keep newest items first in each section and retain the provided entry formats.
-->

This page collects the scientific outputs of the MEMELAND project.
It will be updated as publications, datasets, and other resources become available.

## Publications

*No publications yet — check back soon.*

<!-- When adding a publication, use this format:

**Author A, Author B, Author C** (YYYY).
Title of the paper.
*Journal Name*, volume(issue), pages.
[DOI link](https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxxx)
| [PDF](link-to-pdf) | [Data](link-to-data)

Group entries by year, newest first.
-->

## Datasets

*No datasets deposited yet.*

<!-- When adding a dataset entry:

**Author A, Author B** (YYYY).
*Dataset title* [Data set].
Repository Name.
[https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxxx](https://doi.org/10.xxxx/xxxxx)
-->

## Presentations & Posters

**Schneider T, Brown A, Mackay H, Lang A, Hamerow H, Mottl O, Dubois N** (2026, April). *Sedimentary faecal biomarkers in European lakes: tracing land-use activity during the medieval agricultural revolution*.
EGU General Assembly 2026, Vienna, Austria.
[![DOI](https://img.shields.io/badge/DOI-10.5194%2Fegusphere--egu26--7602-896a2b?style=flat-square)](https://doi.org/10.5194/egusphere-egu26-7602) [![Poster](https://img.shields.io/badge/Poster-download-8a9a5b.png?style=flat-square)](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/27480442/EGU2026_Schneider.et.al-2026-04-27_printed.pdf)

<!-- Suggested format:

**Author A** (YYYY, Month). *Presentation title*.
Conference Name, City, Country.
[Slides](link) | [Poster](link)
-->

## Reports & Deliverables

*No project reports or deliverables published yet.*

<!-- Suggested format:

**Deliverable D1.1** — *Title of deliverable* (YYYY, Month).
[Download PDF](link)
-->

## Theses

*No theses completed within the project yet.*

<!-- Suggested format:

**Student Name** (YYYY). *Thesis title*.
[PhD / MSc] thesis, University Name.
[Link](link)
-->
